title: SaplingIvkDecryptor validates ivk_bytes as canonical Fr in constructor
description: scanner.rs:149-156 — New validates 32-byte IVK as canonical jubjub::Fr before storing (Zeroizing bytes only, not the Fr value). On each decrypt call, Fr is reconstructed; the expect is unreachable by construction. Correct design: fail-fast at construction, avoid storing non-Zeroize Fr on heap, prevent key material persistence. Future contributor might suggest storing Fr directly for simplicity — reject: Fr does not implement Zeroize.
